Package com.societegenerale.failover.core.report

package com.societegenerale.failover.core.report
Reporting and metrics publication for the failover lifecycle.

FailoverReporter emits startup, store, and recover events. Built-in publishers target SLF4J and Micrometer. CompositeReportPublisher fans out to multiple publishers simultaneously.

  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    com.societegenerale.failover.core
    Central failover handler and execution abstractions.
    com.societegenerale.failover.core.report.manifest
    Manifest-based metadata extraction for the failover startup report.
  • Class
    Description
    AbstractReportPublisher
    Base ReportPublisher that stamps each Metrics object with the current timestamp before delegating to AbstractReportPublisher.doPublish(Metrics).
    CompositeReportPublisher
    ReportPublisher that fans metrics out to a list of delegate publishers.
    DefaultFailoverReporter
    Default FailoverReporter that scans for all @Failover-annotated methods and publishes a startup summary metric for each one.
    Event
    Structured technical event that writes its attributes to MDC before emitting a single INFO log line.
    FailoverReporter
    Publishes a startup summary of all detected @Failover configurations.
    LoggerReportPublisher
    AbstractReportPublisher that writes failover metrics to the SLF4J logger at INFO level.
    Metrics
    Mutable key-value bag for failover metrics, keyed with a "failover-" prefix.
    MetricsReportPublisher
    AbstractReportPublisher that emits failover metrics as a technical Event via MDC-based structured logging.
    ReportPublisher
    SPI for publishing failover metrics to an external sink (log, metrics system, event bus, etc.).
